milestones.event: Founded as 有限会社日本総合システム in Kadoma City, Osaka
Opened Osaka branch; Capital increased to 3 million yen
Moved Osaka branch to Shin-Osaka Daibiru
Incorporated as 株式会社 (stock company)
Renamed to 株式会社ネクサス; Capital increased to 10 million yen
Moved Osaka branch to Toyonaka City
